_comment: Price map: USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Edit these to match your contract/region. Add a row per model id you compare. If a model is missing here, ferry errors and tells you to add it. Note: Claude Sonnet 5 has introductory pricing of $2 in / $10 out per 1M tokens through 2026-08-31 (standard $3/$15 shown below) — edit if you want the intro rate.
